Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix iOS build: pin in_app_purchase_storekit to 0.3.17

The newer version 0.4.8 uses StoreKit2 APIs \(winBackOffers,
eligibleWinBackOfferIDs\) that require iOS 18 SDK / Xcode 16.
Pin to 0.3.17 to work with macos-14 runner and Xcode 15.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Switch iOS build to macos-15 with Xcode 16.2

Firebase SDK now requires Swift 6 features \(sending keyword\)
which need Xcode 16+. Updated runner to macos-15 with Xcode 16.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add iOS SDK download step for macos-15 runner

Xcode 16.2 on macos-15 doesn''t have iOS SDK pre-installed.
Added xcodebuild -downloadPlatform iOS step to fetch it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Try default Xcode on macos-15 for pre-installed iOS SDK

Try using pre-installed Xcode versions that have iOS SDK.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Pin Firebase iOS SDK to 10.29.0 for Xcode 15 compatibility

Firebase 11.x uses Swift 6 features \(sending keyword\) requiring Xcode 16.
Pin to 10.29.0 which works with Swift 5 / Xcode 15.4.
Switch back to macos-14 runner which has iOS SDK pre-installed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix iOS dependency conflicts for Xcode 15 build

- Disable firebase_app_check \(causes AppCheckCore version conflicts\)
- Downgrade google_sign_in to 6.1.6 \(uses GoogleSignIn 7.x SDK\)
- This makes Firebase 10.29.0 compatible with all dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
